text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're making steady progress on<n>our plans to
bring back the Grand<n>Concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Please stop by and check out our<n>concert! All are
welcome! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, that was my last flyer. Gotta go<n>get—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Here you are!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Dance Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's get started on that<n>special lesson
you asked for.

text_block_list.name: Dance Instructor
text_block_list.text: Don't mention it. Now then—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Oh, almost forgot! I went ahead and<n>sent you the
dance videos you asked<n>for.

text_block_list.name: Dance Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Ah, great! I really wanted to take<n>inspiration from
that group for the<n>choreography.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Looks like you could use a rest.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I'm fine. I'm hardly going<n>above and
beyond.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
After all, offering this kind of support<n>is about all I
can do.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, the outdoor stage is free right<n>now, and I was
thinking... Could we<n>try an impromptu concert?!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Of course! Let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for coming!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aaand no one's here. So much for<n>stardom...
choice_data_list: Well, this was just a test run.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Gah... I'll never give up! Not till I make<n>everyone's
hearts throb!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I wasn't expecting... this...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Huh? O-oh, yeah, you're right! Let's<n>make our
next concert bigger!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Falco's performance was<n>impeccable, but we still
failed to<n>gather a crowd. It must be because I
haven't done enough to promote our<n>project...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait, what? No, no, this is totally<n>different!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...You think so?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know so! See, what happened is I<n>failed to get
across just how fun<n>concerts can be!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It sucks, yeah, but we just have to<n>put our heads
together and think<n>about how we can steal
everyone's<n>hearts at the real concert!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: A concert that'll steal people's<n>hearts...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That includes you too, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Right. Let's put our thinking caps on!
Right. Let's put our thinking caps on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After wrapping up the impromptu<n>concert, we take
some time to<n>discuss next steps. Then, on the
way<n>home...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Oh, s-sorry! We'll do better next time!<n>Next time,
I'll...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I'll...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...
choice_data_list: How about we grab a bite to eat?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... That would be lovely, if you<n>don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
choice_data_list: Thanks for all your hard work on the project.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
What? No, I should be thanking you!<n>Really, I don't
know what I'd do<n>without you two.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: They really are tricky, aren't they?<n>Concerts.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Well, actually, um...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I... don't have a whole lot of<n>experience with them.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't tell you what it takes to<n>make a concert
a success... or even<n>what a successful concert
looks like,<n>really.
choice_data_list: Then what drew you to the Grand Concert?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...I want to create something thateveryone on stage can enjoy witha smile.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Even those backstage, where no<n>spotlight
shines...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, that's why I'm doing this. And<n>I need to
work harder to make it a<n>reality!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I intend to put all of myself into this
project—everything I've learned from<n>my work up
until now!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for inviting me to share a<n>meal with
you! I'll get the bill.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I know what I need to do now—study<n>up on how to
make a concert that'll<n>capture people's hearts,
like Falco<n>said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can get a word in, Light Hello<n>pays the bill
and dashes out of the<n>restaurant, still looking a
little on edge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, we're at the school<n>gates,
handing out flyers for our first<n>concert.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? Grand Concert... concert... Yes,<n>that's it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: T-Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I've overlooked<n>something so
simple! Concerts! Why,<n>I've hardly incorporated
them into the<n>research at all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Crowd density, conformity... the<n>"wave" even.
Something here could<n>hold the potential to affect
both brain<n>matter and bodily stimulation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... I look forward to the firstday of observations. And on the bigday, I might like to bring her alongas well...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...W-wait a second. So does that mean<n>you're
gonna help us?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All in all, preparations for our first<n>concert are
going smoothly.
